zh.UI_DAY_STATE_CLOSING: 营业状态：已打烊（收尾中）
zh.UI_DAY_STATE_CLEANUP: 收摊整理：在收银台按 E 进入结算
zh.UI_PROMPT_COUNTER_OPEN: T 开业 / E 柜台
zh.UI_PROMPT_DELIVERY_STAPLE: E 提交主食 / 出餐
zh.UI_PROMPT_STORAGE: E 查看仓库 / 开业前补货
zh.UI_PROMPT_HELD_COOKED_STAPLE: 手持熟主食：先去出餐点
zh.UI_PROMPT_HELD_OTHER_STAPLE: 手持其他主食：回对应筐放回
zh.UI_CART_POT_DESC: 锅内每一批都会独立计时。只要还有容量，就可以继续加入食材并盖上锅盖开始新批次。
zh.UI_CART_POT_ROW: %s 生 x%d 锅中熟 x%d 本次煮 x%d
zh.UI_STAPLE_LADLE_COOKING: 漏勺 %d：正在煮 %s，剩余 %.1f 秒
zh.UI_STAPLE_LADLE_READY: 漏勺 %d：%s 已煮好，等待取出
zh.UI_SUPPLIER_ORDER_DESC: 开业前可以批量订货。食材和主食都按篮/箱送达；开业后供货商就不接单了。
zh.UI_SUPPLIER_NOODLE_TUTORIAL_LOCKED: 教程日开局暂不能从早市供应商购买面。第二位顾客需要面时，请使用应急采购。
zh.UI_SETTLEMENT_STALL_ECHO_EMPTY:
今日小摊回响：
暂无记录
zh.UI_SETTLEMENT_CAT_HINT:
拖熟食来喂
或点击摸头
zh.UI_SETTLEMENT_CAT_NO_LEFTOVER: 今天没有剩余熟食，可以摸摸小猫。
zh.UI_CAT_REACTION_ALL_DONE: 小猫把今天剩下的都解决啦
zh.UI_DAY_GIFT_DESC: 特殊客人留下了一个小小的回响。选择其中一种影响。
zh.UI_GLOBAL_RUN_HINT: 可以打开特殊客人的回响，选择其中一种影响。
zh.UI_GLOBAL_RUN_NO_GIFTS: 当前没有可以打开的回响。
zh.UI_GLOBAL_RUN_CHOOSE_ECHO:
选择一种回响。

打开后会立刻成为当前效果；今晚不会再重复结算这个回响。
zh.UI_GIFT_MOUSE_BAD_SLOW_START_DESC: 今天顾客等待耐心略微下降。
zh.UI_GIFT_BUSY_STALL_DESC: 顾客来得更快，适合想多做几单的时候。
zh.UI_GIFT_STEADY_PAWS_DESC: 记录为一个稳定经营效果。
zh.UI_CARD_TIDY_UP_DESC: 小猫把摊位重新整理好。每天早上额外获得一点随机生食材。
zh.UI_CARD_TAKE_A_BREATH_DESC: 小猫坐下来缓了一口气。之后顾客耐心略微提高。
zh.UI_CARD_CHEER_UP_AGAIN_DESC: 小猫重新打起精神。之后顾客来得略微更快。
zh.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_READING_NOTES: 小猫正在翻看一本油乎乎的小本子。
zh.UI_MORNING_TITLE_READING_NOTES: 昨晚小猫翻了翻小本子
zh.UI_MORNING_TEXT_READING_NOTES: 小猫从笔记里整理出了一点明日小摊情报。
zh.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_CHATTING_NEIGHBOR: 小猫在和路过的街坊小声聊天。
zh.UI_MORNING_TITLE_CHATTING_NEIGHBOR: 昨晚小猫和街坊聊了聊
zh.UI_MORNING_TEXT_CHATTING_NEIGHBOR: 小猫听到了一些关于明天街口的小消息。
zh.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_CHECKING_NOTICE: 小猫认真看了看贴在街口的小纸条。
zh.UI_MORNING_TITLE_CHECKING_NOTICE: 昨晚小猫看了街口的小纸条
zh.UI_MORNING_TEXT_CHECKING_NOTICE: 小猫注意到明天附近可能会有些变化。
zh.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_SORTING_INGREDIENTS: 小猫把剩下的食材重新数了一遍。
zh.UI_MORNING_TEXT_SORTING_INGREDIENTS: 小猫对明天的备货有了一点想法。
zh.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_RESTING_CART: 小猫趴在餐车旁边，尾巴轻轻晃着。
zh.UI_MORNING_TITLE_RESTING_CART: 昨晚小猫好好休息了一会儿
zh.UI_MORNING_TEXT_RESTING_CART: 小猫决定明天也要稳稳地把热乎乎的东西端出去。
zh.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_FINAL_REST: 小猫收好餐车，安静地看着今天的小摊灯光慢慢暗下去。
zh.UI_EVENT_STREET_BUSY_TEXT: 今天路过小摊的人会多一点。
zh.UI_EVENT_STREET_BUSY_NOTICE_TEXT: 今天附近人流会比平时多一点。
zh.UI_EVENT_SLOW_DAY_TEXT: 今天大家好像都不太着急。
zh.UI_EVENT_EXTRA_RAW_PREP_TEXT: 小猫今天早上多找出了一点能用的生食材。
zh.UI_EVENT_MARKET_FRIEND_TEXT: 今天临时补货会便宜一点。
zh.UI_ECHO_PENDING_NONE: 当前没有未查看的特殊客人回响。
zh.UI_CARD_CLAW_DANCE_DESC: 小猫收摊时练了练爪子。之后顾客来得稍微更快。
zh.UI_CARD_SLOW_DOWN_MEOW_DESC: 小猫决定不要那么慌。之后顾客耐心稍微提高。
zh.UI_CARD_PREPARE_FIRST_DESC: 小猫学会提前整理食材。每天早上额外获得少量随机生食材。
zh.UI_CARD_BUSY_STALL_DESC: 老鼠把这家小摊告诉了附近的朋友。之后顾客来得更快。
zh.UI_CARD_CLEAN_PLATE_DESC: 老鼠把碗吃得干干净净。之后普通供货商进货稍微便宜。
zh.UI_CARD_SNEAK_AROUND_DESC: 老鼠知道附近哪里能临时借到食材。之后临时借货稍微便宜。
zh.UI_CARD_MESSY_RHYTHM_DESC: 今晚的小摊有些慌乱。之后顾客耐心稍微降低。
zh.UI_CARD_IMPATIENT_CUSTOMERS_DESC: 不好的服务让一些顾客留下了坏印象。之后顾客耐心明显降低。
zh.UI_CARD_SLOWER_RHYTHM_DESC: 今晚的失误打乱了小摊节奏。之后顾客来得稍微慢一点。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_LADLE_READY: 漏勺 %d 的 %s 煮好了。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_HAND_HAS_COOKED_DELIVER_FIRST: 手里已经有主食：%s。先去出餐点交付。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_LADLE_NOT_READY_TO_TAKE: 漏勺 %d 还没有可以取出的主食。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_TAKEN_FROM_LADLE: 从漏勺 %d 取出：%s。现在手里拿着这份主食。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_PICKED_RAW: 拿起生主食：%s。此时不扣库存。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_RETURNED_RAW: 把生主食放回：%s。因为还没下漏勺，所以不扣库存。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_HELD_RAW_NEEDS_MATCHING_BASKE: 手里拿着的是：%s。要回对应主食篮才能放回。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_LADLE_EMPTY_NEEDS_RAW: 漏勺 %d 是空的。先去粉丝筐或面筐拿生主食。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_PUT_IN_LADLE: 已经把生主食放入漏勺 %d。这时才扣库存。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_LADLE_COOKING_STATUS: 漏勺 %d 正在煮 %s，还剩 %.1f 秒。
zh.LOG_STAPLE_HELD_RAW_BLOCKS_READY: 手里还拿着生主食：%s。先放回主食篮，或者找空漏勺下锅。
zh.LOG_CUSTOMER_STILL_SHORTAGE_EMERGENCY: 顾客订单还在缺货，先去应急采购。
zh.LOG_CART_COOKED_INGREDIENTS_SHORTAGE: 锅中熟配菜不足，需要继续煮。缺口：%s
zh.LOG_CART_INGREDIENTS_SUBMITTED: 已从大锅提交配菜给顾客：%s
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_OPEN_BUSINESS: 新手提示：准备好后到柜台按 T 开业。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_VIEW_ORDER: 新手提示：顾客到柜台后，按 E 查看订单。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_TAKE_PAYMENT: 新手提示：再次按 E 收钱，订单才会正式成立。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_WAIT_CUSTOMER: 新手提示：等待顾客到柜台。可以利用空闲时间查看库存或准备食材。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_PREPARE_FIRST_ORDER: 新手提示：制作第一单。配菜放入大锅煮；去粉丝筐拿粉丝，再放入漏勺煮。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_FIRST_ORDER_BIG_POT: 新手提示：先做配菜。去大锅按 E，选择第一单需要的配菜，开始烹饪。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_FIRST_ORDER_STAPLE: 新手提示：现在做粉丝。去粉丝筐拿粉丝，再到空漏勺按 E 放入煮。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_TAKE_FIRST_STAPLE: 新手提示：粉丝煮好了。去漏勺按 E 取出粉丝，再拿到出餐口提交。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_PREPARE_ORDER: 新手提示：订单在等待出餐。需要配菜就去大锅，需要主食就去对应筐和漏勺。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_PUT_STAPLE_IN_LADLE: 新手提示：手里拿着生主食，去空漏勺按 E 放入并开始煮。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_DELIVER_STAPLE: 新手提示：手里拿着熟主食，去出餐口按 E 提交。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_WAIT_COOKING: 新手提示：食物正在烹饪，主食和配菜都完成后去出餐口按 E 出餐。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_READY_TO_DELIVER: 新手提示：去出餐口按 E 提交粉丝和已煮好的配菜，订单完成后就能出餐。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_SECOND_CUSTOMER_NOODLE: 新手提示：第二位顾客会需要面；如果库存不足，去 EmergencyShop 应急补货。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_TIMER_STARTED: 新手提示：前两单完成，营业倒计时开始。可以继续经营，也可以到柜台手动打烊。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_AUTO_CLOSED_CLEANUP: 新手提示：时间到，已经自动打烊。整理完顾客和食物后，到柜台按 E 日结。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_NIGHT_CHOICE: 新手提示：夜间三选一。选择一张卡作为后续经营效果，选完后才能进入下一天。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_FREE_PLAY: 新手提示：可以自由经营了，等待今天营业结束后进入结算。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_WAIT_CLEANUP: 新手提示：已经打烊，等顾客离开和食物处理完后就能结算。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_CLEANUP: 新手提示：收摊完成，到柜台按 E 进入日结算。
zh.UI_TUTORIAL_CHECK_STORAGE: 新手提示：先去仓库按 E 查看库存和补货。
zh.UI_CAT_REACTION_CLEAN_LEFTOVERS: 小猫把剩下的熟食收拾掉了。
zh.LOG_HAND_STAPLE_NO_MATCHING_CUSTOMER: 手里有主食，但没有等待这种主食的顾客：%s
zh.LOG_ORDER_NO_CUSTOMER_WAITING_STAPLE: 没有等待这个主食的顾客。
zh.LOG_ORDER_STAPLE_SUBMITTED_PARTIAL: 已提交主食。订单还没完成，订单卡会继续显示剩余内容。
zh.LOG_ORDER_INGREDIENTS_SUBMITTED_PARTIAL: 已提交当前能交的配菜。订单还没完成，订单卡会继续显示剩余内容。
zh.LOG_SMOKE_START: 开始运行最小经营流程 smoke 检查。

en.UI_DAY_STATE_CLEANUP: Cleanup: Press E at the counter to settle
en.UI_TITLE_SETTINGS_NOT_READY: Settings screen is not ready yet.
en.UI_TITLE_CREDITS_NOT_READY: Credits screen is not ready yet.
en.UI_HOME_MAIN_HINT: This is the main function screen.
en.UI_HOME_NOTEBOOK_NOT_READY: Cat Notebook is not ready yet.
en.UI_HOME_MAP_NOT_READY: Map system is not ready yet.
en.UI_PROMPT_HELD_OTHER_STAPLE: Holding another staple: return it to its basket
en.UI_CART_POT_DESC: Each batch in the pot cooks on its own timer. If capacity remains, add more toppings and close the lid to start another batch.
en.UI_CART_POT_ROW: %s Raw x%d Cooked x%d This batch x%d
en.UI_SUPPLIER_ORDER_DESC: Order in bulk before opening. Ingredients and staples arrive by basket or box; the supplier stops taking orders after opening.
en.UI_SUPPLIER_NOODLE_TUTORIAL_LOCKED: Noodles are locked from the morning supplier on the tutorial day. When the second customer needs noodles, use EmergencyShop.
en.UI_RUN_SETTLEMENT_EARNED_HINT: You earned money through the whole run!
en.UI_SETTLEMENT_CAT_HINT:
Drag cooked food here
or pet the cat
en.UI_SETTLEMENT_CAT_NO_LEFTOVER: No cooked leftovers today. You can pet the cat.
en.UI_DAY_GIFT_DESC: A special customer left a small echo. Choose one effect.
en.UI_GLOBAL_RUN_HINT: Open a special customer echo and choose one effect.
en.UI_GLOBAL_RUN_NO_GIFTS: There are no echoes to open.
en.UI_GLOBAL_RUN_CHOOSE_ECHO:
Choose one echo.

After opening, it becomes an active effect immediately and will not be settled again tonight.
en.UI_GIFT_MOUSE_BAD_SLOW_START_DESC: Customers have slightly less patience today.
en.UI_GIFT_BUSY_STALL_DESC: Customers arrive faster. Good for making more orders.
en.UI_GIFT_STEADY_PAWS_DESC: Record as a stable operation effect.
en.UI_CARD_TIDY_UP_DESC: The cat tidies the stall again. Gain a little random raw stock each morning.
en.UI_CARD_TAKE_A_BREATH_DESC: The cat sits down for a breath. Customers have slightly more patience afterward.
en.UI_CARD_CHEER_UP_AGAIN_DESC: The cat cheers up again. Customers arrive slightly faster afterward.
en.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_READING_NOTES: The cat is flipping through a greasy little notebook.
en.UI_MORNING_TITLE_READING_NOTES: The cat checked the notebook last night
en.UI_MORNING_TEXT_READING_NOTES: The cat found a little information about tomorrow's stall.
en.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_CHATTING_NEIGHBOR: The cat is quietly chatting with neighbors passing by.
en.UI_MORNING_TITLE_CHATTING_NEIGHBOR: The cat chatted with neighbors last night
en.UI_MORNING_TEXT_CHATTING_NEIGHBOR: The cat heard a little news about tomorrow at the street corner.
en.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_CHECKING_NOTICE: The cat carefully reads a small notice at the street corner.
en.UI_MORNING_TITLE_CHECKING_NOTICE: The cat checked the street notice last night
en.UI_MORNING_TEXT_CHECKING_NOTICE: The cat noticed there may be some changes nearby tomorrow.
en.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_SORTING_INGREDIENTS: The cat counts the remaining ingredients again.
en.UI_MORNING_TITLE_SORTING_INGREDIENTS: The cat sorted ingredients last night
en.UI_MORNING_TEXT_SORTING_INGREDIENTS: The cat has an idea for tomorrow's prep.
en.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_RESTING_CART: The cat lies beside the cart, tail gently swaying.
en.UI_MORNING_TITLE_RESTING_CART: The cat rested well last night
en.UI_MORNING_TEXT_RESTING_CART: The cat decides to steadily serve hot food again tomorrow.
en.UI_NIGHT_ACTIVITY_FINAL_REST: The cat packs up the cart and quietly watches the stall lights dim.
en.UI_EVENT_STREET_BUSY_TEXT: More people will pass by the stall today.
en.UI_EVENT_STREET_BUSY_NOTICE_TEXT: There will be a little more foot traffic nearby today.
en.UI_EVENT_EXTRA_RAW_PREP_TEXT: The cat found a little more usable raw stock this morning.
en.UI_EVENT_MARKET_FRIEND_TEXT: Emergency restocking is a little cheaper today.
en.UI_CARD_CLAW_DANCE_DESC: The cat practiced its paws while closing the stall. Customers arrive slightly faster afterward.
en.UI_CARD_SLOW_DOWN_MEOW_DESC: The cat decides not to rush so much. Customers have slightly more patience afterward.
en.UI_CARD_PREPARE_FIRST_DESC: The cat learns to organize ingredients early. Gain a little random raw stock each morning.
en.UI_CARD_BUSY_STALL_DESC: The mouse tells nearby friends about the stall. Customers arrive faster afterward.
en.UI_CARD_CLEAN_PLATE_DESC: The mouse eats the bowl completely clean. Regular supplier orders are slightly cheaper afterward.
en.UI_CARD_SNEAK_AROUND_DESC: The mouse knows where to borrow ingredients nearby. Emergency restocking is slightly cheaper afterward.
en.UI_CARD_MESSY_RHYTHM_DESC: Tonight the stall felt a bit frantic. Customers have slightly less patience afterward.
en.UI_CARD_IMPATIENT_CUSTOMERS_DESC: Poor service leaves some customers with a bad impression. Customer patience drops noticeably afterward.
en.UI_CARD_SLOWER_RHYTHM_DESC: Tonight's mistakes disrupted the stall rhythm. Customers arrive slightly slower afterward.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_OPEN_BUSINESS: Tutorial: When you are ready, go to the counter and press T to open.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_VIEW_ORDER: Tutorial: When a customer reaches the counter, press E to view the order.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_TAKE_PAYMENT: Tutorial: Press E again to collect payment and confirm the order.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_WAIT_CUSTOMER: Tutorial: Wait for a customer at the counter. You can check stock or prep while waiting.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_PREPARE_FIRST_ORDER: Tutorial: Make the first order. Cook toppings in the big pot; take glass noodles from the basket, then put them into a ladle.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_FIRST_ORDER_BIG_POT: Tutorial: Start with toppings. Press E at the big pot, choose the first order's toppings, and cook them.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_FIRST_ORDER_STAPLE: Tutorial: Now make glass noodles. Take them from the glass noodle basket, then press E at an empty ladle.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_TAKE_FIRST_STAPLE: Tutorial: The glass noodles are ready. Press E at the ladle to take them, then submit them at the serving point.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_PREPARE_ORDER: Tutorial: This order is waiting for food. Use the big pot for toppings, and the matching basket and ladle for staples.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_PUT_STAPLE_IN_LADLE: Tutorial: Put the raw staple in an empty ladle with E to start cooking.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_DELIVER_STAPLE: Tutorial: Take the cooked staple to the serving point and press E.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_WAIT_COOKING: Tutorial: Food is cooking. When both staple and toppings are ready, press E at the serving point.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_READY_TO_DELIVER: Tutorial: Go to the serving point and press E to submit the noodles and cooked toppings until the order is served.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_SECOND_CUSTOMER_NOODLE: Tutorial: The second customer will need noodles. If stock is short, use EmergencyShop.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_TIMER_STARTED: Tutorial: The first two orders are done, so the business timer has started. Keep serving, or close manually at the counter.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_AUTO_CLOSED_CLEANUP: Tutorial: Time is up and the stall closed automatically. Finish active customers and food, then press E at the counter for settlement.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_NIGHT_CHOICE: Tutorial: Night choice. Pick one of the three cards as a future business effect before going to the next day.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_FREE_PLAY: Tutorial: You can run the stall freely now. Wait for closing and settlement.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_WAIT_CLEANUP: Tutorial: The stall is closed. Finish active customers and food before settlement.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_CLEANUP: Tutorial: Cleanup is done. Press E at the counter to enter day settlement.
en.UI_TUTORIAL_CHECK_STORAGE: Tutorial: First press E at storage to check stock and restock.
en.LOG_STAPLE_HAND_HAS_COOKED_DELIVER_FIRST: Already holding staple: %s. Deliver it first.
en.LOG_STAPLE_LADLE_NOT_READY_TO_TAKE: Ladle %d has no staple ready to take.
en.LOG_STAPLE_TAKEN_FROM_LADLE: Took %s from ladle %d. It is now in hand.
en.LOG_STAPLE_ITEM_INVALID: This is not a usable staple: %s
en.LOG_STAPLE_STOCK_NOT_ENOUGH: %s stock is not enough to take.
en.LOG_STAPLE_PICKED_RAW: Picked up raw staple: %s. Stock is not deducted yet.
en.LOG_STAPLE_RETURNED_RAW: Returned raw staple: %s. Stock is unchanged because it was not placed in a ladle.
en.LOG_STAPLE_HELD_RAW_NEEDS_MATCHING_BASKE: Holding: %s. Return it to the matching staple basket.
en.LOG_STAPLE_LADLE_EMPTY_NEEDS_RAW: Ladle %d is empty. Take a raw staple from a staple basket first.
en.LOG_STAPLE_PUT_IN_LADLE: Raw staple was placed into ladle %d. Stock is deducted now.
en.LOG_STAPLE_HELD_RAW_BLOCKS_READY: Still holding raw staple: %s. Return it to its basket or put it into an empty ladle first.
en.LOG_CUSTOMER_STILL_SHORTAGE_EMERGENCY: Customer order still has shortages. Do emergency purchase first.
en.LOG_CART_COOKED_INGREDIENTS_SHORTAGE: Cooked toppings in pot are not enough. Keep cooking. Shortage: %s
en.LOG_CART_INGREDIENTS_SUBMITTED: Submitted toppings from the big pot to customer: %s
en.LOG_HAND_STAPLE_NO_MATCHING_CUSTOMER: Holding staple, but no customer is waiting for this staple: %s
en.LOG_ORDER_NO_CUSTOMER_WAITING_STAPLE: No customer is waiting for this staple.
en.LOG_ORDER_STAPLE_SUBMITTED_PARTIAL: Staple submitted. Order is not complete yet; the order card will keep showing remaining items.
en.LOG_ORDER_INGREDIENTS_SUBMITTED_PARTIAL: Submitted currently available toppings. Order is not complete yet; the order card will keep showing remaining items.
